calendar.matters:
Petition To Find That Assets Are Property Of Trust Under Probate Code 17200(B)(4), 850(A)(3), & 856
Off Calendar Aug-23-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kerry Sykes for petitioner Patricia Williams.

Ms. Sykes stated that despite much effort on her part, Bank of America refused to provide documentation she requested regarding when the Bank of America accounts were created. She confirmed that she has been able to confirm that the settlor had only two Bank of America accounts, and that as the trust document references accounts held at Bank of America, a valid inference can be made that this applies to the two accounts referenced in the petition. She also stated that the amount in the questioned account was very small. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Chan. (Not reported)

Petition To Find That Assets Are Property Of Trust Under Probate Code 17200(B)(4), 850(A)(3), & 856
Off Calendar Aug-02-2016 Continued To Aug-16-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kerry R. Sykes and Maureen McFadden for petitioner Patricia Williams.

The Court stated that he had not been provided evidence that the bank accounts which were the subject of the petition were in existence at the time the trust was established or at the time of the amended and restated trust instrument. Ms. Sykes offered to address that issue in a supplemental declaration, which she said she could have on file by August 8, 2016. The matter was continued to August 16, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not reported)
